programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A deputy and his K9 wade through the murky waters of a Georgia swamp to catch a submerged felon; in Louisiana's Cajun country, a suspect escapes into a gator-filled bayou; a man accused of armed robbery takes the plunge, and a deputy dons his heroic cape to save a drowning pup.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A license check spirals when a suspect refuses to surrender; in Louisiana, a fugitive vanishes into thin air; a Georgia traffic stop almost costs a deputy his life, and a plane crash sends deputies deep into the swamp to rescue a father and daughter.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A K9 unit tracks a copper thief through punishing wetlands; a deputy gets a lucky escape after a gunman triggers a tense standoff; a suspect tries to make a watery getaway, and a dramatic car chase in Georgia leads to a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A car thief flees arrest, sparking a two-day manhunt; a drone helps a rookie K9 make his first arrest, while in Florida, two suspects take to the water in a bid to escape justice and in Louisiana, a routine traffic stop reveals a dark tragedy.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Florida, troopers risk life and limb wading through gator-infested swamps to track a suspect; a thief in Georgia is close to becoming gator feed to evade capture; a man acting erratically makes a surprising getaway and a gator comes between a woman and her pizza.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A suspect dives into open water and vanishes into the mangroves; in Texas, a chase ends in a swampy manhunt as officers call in reinforcements after suspects bail and disappear into the swampland; an armed arson suspect sparks an 11-hour standoff... high up in a tree.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A naked woman is arrested for stealing a sheriff's pickup truck; a gym goer loses his cool and his clothing; and a golf pro spectator streaks into the spotlight.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country; a woman alerts police to a crime she's committing; a golf game leads to one player to see red on the green; a man wants to get paid by police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A senior citizen wields an unusual weapon, her mouth; a suspected criminal uses a local police station as a drive-thru; a man in a crazy costume takes police on a wild chase.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man calls 911 on the cops; a woman is accused of stealing a horse and buggy; a man allegedly trespasses and shoots rats in a neighbor's yard.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man hangs on the hood of his car while his ex-girlfriend drives it on the highway; an intoxicated woman flees from airport police on a motorized suitcase; a man take a selfie with his daughter inside an elephant enclosure at the zoo.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country; a man dangles precariously from a bridge trying to elude police; two women are arrested for twerking on a police car with the officer still inside; a man calls police on a stripper and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the arrests from across the country; a man arrested at sea tries to swim away from police; a man wearing a blue bonnet steals baby formula; a mom goes to extreme measures with a housemate and is arrested for assault.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strangest arrests from across the country; a shopper on gummies freaks out at the supermarket; a man drives backwards on a major thoroughfare; a car smashes through a fast-food restaurant; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A boater goes off the deep end; a naked man causes traffic chaos; a police uniform-swiper gets taken to the cleaners; and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; a naked man allegedly attacks police with a shovel; a woman refuses to leave a restaurant until she gets a free glass of water; a 20-year-old woman says to authorities that she's only 13; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: Two women are arrested for allegedly stealing 17 baseball bats; a reality show star is arrested for DUI; a couple is thrown out of a renaissance festival for disturbing a juggler.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country; a man claiming to be Jesus Christ causes a disturbance at church; a woman is arrested for indecent exposure after a blind date gone wrong; Police chase a man on a stolen golf cart; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A suspect crashes into a jail; a woman has fun at the movies; a vandal wreaks havoc at a winery.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man in a leopard print onesie is arrested for stealing from a pet store; a gas station robbery has a strange culprit; a driver arrested for DUI finds new ways to add to his rap sheet.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; a man calls his mommy for help during a traffic stop; a disgruntled shopper acts deaf when police arrive; a woman drives her car into a hotel room; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some strange arrests from across the country; a woman bites an officer, slips her handcuffs and takes off in a police car; a man urinates on $10,000 worth of canned meat; a woman shows up at a protest march in a sexually explicit inflatable costume; and more!

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: Night falls in Louisiana as officers disturb a prolific burglar who escapes into gator-infested waters. Meanwhile, undercover detectives take to the Florida swamps to hunt down a wanted felon and police responding to a welfare call are taken by surprise. Later, a car chase in Arkansas ends up in flames and a deputy makes a big bird arrest.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A berry heist sparks a manhunt into dense scrub while in Louisiana, a fugitive vanishes into the marsh at night; a stolen car chase crashes out, a K9 delivers a painful lesson, and officers race to save a mother trapped in a submerged car.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: Deep in the swamps of the southern USA, a suspect swings through the trees in a desperate bid to avoid capture; a man crashes into marshland, sparking a grueling 14-hour manhunt; and in Texas, officers face an even bigger threat, as a 10-foot alligator requires some serious wrangling.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Georgia, a crazed driver slams into a patrol car before escaping into swamp woods; deputies brave Florida's treacherous wetlands at night to track down an invisible fugitive; patrol officers chase a kayaker living on a derelict houseboat among the mangroves and in Louisiana, there's a snake alert!

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie helps Gwyneth and James navigate head-versus-heart to find a home near Glasgow where they can start a family. In Stirling, Phil balances Lorraine and her daughters' needs.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Home County Cartel
programme.desc: The covert police unit tracking smugglers bringing huge quantities of drugs into the UK closes in on the ringleaders in a nerve-shredding conclusion.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: It's Joe Wilkinson and Josh Widdicombe v Rhod Gilbert and Thaniya Moore. Frankie Monroe joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Plus, of course, Rachel and Jimmy too.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Love Island, Deal or No Deal, Obsession, The Floor US, Lie with Me, Mighty Truckers and BBC News (England World Cup win).

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Oliver, who has Tourette's syndrome, hopes to bag his first ever girlfriend. Claire, who's usually surrounded by builders, wants to lay the foundations of a dream relationship.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits four restaurants he tried to help: the Spanish Pavillion in New Jersey, and Kingston Café, La Frite and Capri in California.

programme.title: The Accused: Beyond Reasonable Doubt?
programme.desc: In 2012, a hand-delivered letter accuses David Bryant of a historic sex attack. He insists he's innocent but the jury disagree. Years later, can he prove he didn't do it.

programme.title: Dover 24/7: Britain's Busiest Port
programme.desc: A storm threatens to close the port to shipping. Border Force officers discover young women being smuggled into the country. And there's something suspicious in the back of a van.

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In east Devon, master wheelwrights Greg and Mike Rowland embark on a new commission - building a gun carriage to sit aboard the HMS Warrior.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Competing to host the best party in Grimsby are straight-talking Mel and Patrick, seasoned ravers Vanessa and Steve and lovebirds Amber and Ryan, whose matching pink outfits raise eyebrows.

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Nisha Katona in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: .. Not: Rebecca's first boyfriend visits Boston, but she's unaware of the changes in his life. Sam starts a support group for people with stolen sports cars.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: This Time It's for Real: The new owner of Gary's Old Town Tavern reacts badly to the gang's latest prank, but is he really the dangerous character he seems.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm tricks Cliff into believing that one of his jokes is going to be used on The Tonight Show with Johnny Carson. Sam and Woody install a satellite dish.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Much to Debra's annoyance, Marie mollycoddles Ray when he thinks he's coming down with something.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray buys Debra an extravagant Christmas present so that she'll let him go on a golfing weekend. But what if she's getting him a generous gift too.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray tries to prove his 'manliness' after failing to act swiftly enough in an emergency involving Debra.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier comes to terms with his own mortality when a seemingly healthy colleague suddenly dies.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Miracle on Third or Fourth Street: When his son Frederick decides to spend Christmas in Switzerland with Lilith, a dispirited Frasier looks set for a miserable festive season.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Investigating the death of a Wall Street trader leads Castle and Beckett to discover that the victim was an undercover informant for the U.S. Attorney's office.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: A look at the astoundingly beautiful Dinorwic Slate Quarry landscape of North-West Wales - a UNESCO World Heritage site which, in its time was the second largest in the world.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Somerset: Wonder of the West Country
programme.desc: A visit to Cheddar's famous gorge reveals how its world-renowned cheese is made - and the depths its makers go to get the flavour right! Plus, a trip to Dunster Castle.

programme.title: Tour de France 2026
programme.desc: Highlights from Stage 11 as the peloton heads from the spa town of Vichy to Nevers on a stage that could provide opportunities for sprinters and breakaway specialists. Rebecca Charlton hosts.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Paramedics rush to help a 67-year-old HGV driver who has suffered a cardiac arrest, and, in Hillingdon, a man who has suffered severe burns after lighting a bonfire with petrol.

programme.title: Surgeons: A Matter of Life or Death
programme.desc: Gary has a rare tumour in his spine. Leaving it in place will probably lead to paralysis, but an operation carries a huge risk. Margaret has developed a hole in her skull.

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Language is a barrier in dealing with an aggressive male who claims he has been attacked. Children's nurse Kiera treats an 11-year-old who stepped on glass and sliced open her foot.

programme.title: The Hospital: Life on the Line

programme.title: Skin A&E
